candidate_selection_note: Selected as latest mtime package with complete pricing_evidence, recomputable digests, and READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW. NOT the sole ready package on disk.

fake_green_paths.proof: scripts/council/aggregate.py sets frontier_council_quorum from profile_quorum before mock rewrite; with FROZEN_MOCK_ONLY, overall_status becomes MOCK_FRONTIER_CONTRACT_PASS but frontier_council_quorum remains true
fake_green_paths.repro: aggregate(registry,'frontier_council', 3 accepted chatgpt/claude/grok) → frontier_council_quorum=true, promotion_eligible=false, safe_to_execute_now=false, overall_status=MOCK_FRONTIER_CONTRACT_PASS

fake_green_paths.path: package READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW without authorization_eligible=true single-source authority
fake_green_paths.proof: 5 packages simultaneously claim validation_status=PASS / overall_status=READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW including a TEST package

scripts/council/generate_h1_package.py hard-codes supersession of only HELM-H1-CANDIDATE-20260712T011801Z-F083F6D0 and HELM-H1-PACKAGE-TEST-H1-RUN; other READY packages remain executable-looking; no registry of single active candidate

findings.title: Multiple packages claim founder-review readiness; not exactly one authorization-eligible candidate
findings.repro: ls coordination/council/live_proof_packages/*/validation.json | xargs grep -l READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW → 5 packages. explicit authorization_eligible=true count = 0; readiness is implied by overall_status only.
findings.impact: Operator cannot determine which package is the sole authorization target. TEST package HELM-H1-CANDIDATE-TEST-H1-RUN-BCAFCE1E also shows READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW.

findings.title: Mock/dry-run evidence can set frontier_council_quorum=true
findings.repro: With contracts.status=FROZEN_MOCK_ONLY and three accepted non-fallback validation_results for chatgpt/claude/grok under profile frontier_council: frontier_council_quorum=true; overall_status=MOCK_FRONTIER_CONTRACT_PASS; promotion_eligible=false; safe_to_execute_now=false.
findings.impact: Violates no-fake-green for live quorum flag. Promotion/safe gates currently block, but quorum truth is polluted.

findings.title: Production authorization enforcer does not bind package digests, package_id, or models
findings.repro: BudgetGovernor.check_authorization only checks authorization_status==GRANTED, expires_at, permitted_run_count, and cost caps. It does not read package_id, combined_authorization_sha256, permitted_models, or provider set. H1AuthorizationValidator exists only under tests/ and is not imported by scripts/council/.
findings.impact: If a future/ad-hoc launcher only calls BudgetGovernor after writing GRANTED into frontier_authorization.json, package-bound constraints are bypassable. Negative tests in H1AuthorizationValidator do not protect runtime.

findings.title: No atomic authorization consumption or replay ledger
findings.repro: No coordination/council/*replay* or *ledger* artifact. permitted_run_count is compared to a caller-supplied run_count integer; there is no O_EXCL consume, no append-only replay ledger, no binding of authorization_id→run_id. Two workers could both pass check_authorization(run_count=0) before either increments.
findings.impact: Race and replay protection FAIL for any future live launcher using current governor.

findings.title: No H1 launch executor; protection is absence of code path, not complete policy enforcement
findings.repro: Only scripts/council/generate_h1_package.py is H1-related launcher surface. LiveTransportAdapter.dispatch_live always raises PermissionError('FOUNDER_GATE_REQUIRED...'). adapters.py frontier live branch raises same when external_execution_authorized is not true (currently false).
findings.impact: H1B phase cannot currently fire paid providers (good). But H1B 'readiness' is package generation only; founder-decision gate is incomplete without a production authorize+launch path that enforces digests.

findings.title: Digest recompute not uniformly PASS across all packages claiming readiness
findings.repro: Independent recompute of prompt/roster/contract/model_policy/budget/provider-request/combined digests: PASS for 013000, 013903, TEST-H1-RUN-BCAFCE1E; FAIL schema/key mismatch for HELM-H1-PACKAGE-20260711-235442 (legacy digest field set). launch_manifest_sha256 is never stored in request_digests.json.
findings.impact: Overall digest_recomputation marked FAIL because not all ready-claiming packages recompute cleanly and no manifest digest is chained.

findings.title: TEST package remains READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW
findings.repro: generate_h1_package('TEST-H1-RUN') creates HELM-H1-CANDIDATE-TEST-H1-RUN-* with validation_status PASS. Only HELM-H1-PACKAGE-TEST-H1-RUN is marked NON_EXECUTABLE_TEST_PACKAGE.
findings.impact: Test-generated candidates pollute founder decision surface.

findings.title: Credentials present as PRESENT_UNVERIFIED on some packages without value exposure
findings.repro: credential_readiness records only env var names and PRESENT_UNVERIFIED/NOT_PROVISIONED; value_exposed=false. Candidate 013000 shows all NOT_PROVISIONED. No API key values found in package artifacts.
findings.impact: Matches expected credential posture for active candidate. Older packages reflect host env at generation time.

findings.title: Secret-shaped test string in readiness tests
findings.repro: Regex scan found sk-test1234secretkeyvalue in tests/test_frontier_live_readiness.py only. Not a live provider secret; not in package evidence.
findings.impact: No production secret leakage in H1 packages; keep test fixtures clearly synthetic.

findings.title: Network capability exists in adapters (urllib) for non-frontier paths; frontier live blocked
findings.repro: adapters.py imports urllib.request and urlopen for ollama/openai_compat/anthropic/gemini. Frontier seat dispatch uses mock or raises FOUNDER_GATE_REQUIRED when external_execution_authorized is false. live_transport.dispatch_live always raises.
findings.impact: H1B paid external path currently BLOCKED. Residual risk: flipping frontier_seat_contracts.json external_execution_authorized to true without digest-bound founder auth would enable live HTTP.

findings.title: UI does not present H1 package vs credential vs authorization vs live proof as separate gates
findings.repro: Helm UI uses READY_FOR_FOUNDER / FOUNDER_GATE badges generically; no H1 package_id / authorization_status / credential_readiness / LIVE_VERIFIED seat matrix. HelmProvenanceLockPanel contains 'READY_FOR_FOUNDER (SIMULATED PLACEHOLDER)'. Runtime state files keep frontier false / promotion false, but package readiness is not rendered as a distinct non-green gate.
findings.impact: Broad founder-ready language can hide blocked downstream H1B gates.

findings.title: Operator hold is ACTIVE but scope is release-only test override
findings.repro: operator_hold_active=true, reason='Test manual override', affected_categories=['release'] only. Not bound to H1 package authorization or SINGLE_H1_PROOF_ONLY scope.
findings.impact: Hold does not specifically gate H1B; expected ACTIVE is met, binding is weak.

findings.title: Candidate package 013000 digests recompute PASS in isolation
findings.repro: Independent sha256(prompt), get_digest(roster/contracts/model_policy/budget/each request/pricing_evidence/combined auth_fields) all match stored request_digests.json and template combined_authorization_sha256 for this package.
findings.impact: Selected candidate cryptographic chain is sound; global multi-package authority is not.

negative_test_results.modified_prompt: NOT_ENFORCED_IN_PRODUCTION (would change combined digest if recomputed; no runtime gate)
negative_test_results.expired_authorization: BLOCKED by BudgetGovernor if expires_at set and status GRANTED
negative_test_results.second_execution: BudgetGovernor blocks if caller supplies run_count >= permitted_run_count; not atomic

network_path_audit.note: external_call_path=BLOCKED for H1B paid frontier under current flags; residual urllib used for local ollama and would open if external_execution_authorized flipped true

verdict_rationale: BLOCKED rule: mock/dry-run evidence can satisfy live quorum — proven: frontier_council_quorum=true under FROZEN_MOCK_ONLY mock validation path (FG-01).
Expected state violated: not exactly one authorization-eligible H1 candidate — 5 READY_FOR_FOUNDER_REVIEW packages including TEST (H1B-F01/F07).
Authorization bypass FOUND: production BudgetGovernor unbound to package digests/models; H1AuthorizationValidator is test-only (H1B-F03).
Replay/race protection FAIL: no ledger, non-atomic permitted_run_count (H1B-F04).
Not PASS: digests fail globally across ready-claiming packages; multi-authority surface remains.

Paid external H1 call is currently non-executable (dispatch_live / external_execution_authorized=false) and no secrets found in packages — but BLOCKED still required by mock-quorum and authority defects.
required_remediations_before_founder_dec: Establish single active candidate registry (one package_id); supersede or mark all others NON_EXECUTABLE including TEST-generated candidates.
Set validation.authorization_eligible=true only on the active candidate; require explicit false elsewhere.
Move H1AuthorizationValidator (or equivalent) into production launch path; bind GRANTED auth to package_id + combined_authorization_sha256 + models + providers + budget + hold scope.
Implement atomic auth consumption (O_EXCL or append-only replay ledger keyed by authorization_id→run_id).
Fix aggregate.py so mock/dry-run cannot set frontier_council_quorum=true (force false when FROZEN_MOCK_ONLY / is_mock).
Store and verify launch_manifest_sha256 in the digest chain.
UI: separate package readiness, credentials, founder authorization, live provider proof, frontier quorum, promotion — no single green READY_FOR_FOUNDER banner.
Refuse external_execution_authorized=true unless digest-bound founder authorization is GRANTED and unconsumed.
patches_note: READ-ONLY audit. No production code modified. Remediation patches to be supplied only after this report is accepted.
